models.name: stg_acquisition__tiktok_campaign_report
models.description: Staging model for TikTok Ads campaign report from Fivetran — standardizes columns to match marketing_spend schema

models.name: marketing_spend_day_country_agg
models.description: MODIFY: Add TikTok CTE block to existing UNION ALL (channel 7 of 7)

skipped_models.name: marketing_spend_day_agg
skipped_models.reason: Downstream rollup — auto-rebuilds from country_agg, no changes needed

decision_log.decision: multi_source_union pattern — 1 new staging model + 1 modification to existing agg
decision_log.rationale: marketing_spend already aggregates 6 channels via UNION ALL. Adding TikTok as channel 7 requires: (1) new staging model to standardize TikTok columns, (2) add TikTok CTE to marketing_spend_day_country_agg
alternatives_considered: Standalone TikTok pipeline — rejected because marketing_spend is the canonical cross-channel table
